Why Choose Us

Built for Nepal's Logistics Reality

We understand Nepal's roads, regulations, and what it takes to move cargo reliably.

50+ Truck Fleet

One of Nepal's largest privately-owned fleets — 10T to 38T trucks operating pan-Nepal.

Mechi to Mahakali

Full coverage across Nepal. Any route, any district — east to far west.

Transparent Pricing

No hidden charges. Clear FTL and LTL rates before the truck moves.

3 Booking Offices

Book from Kathmandu, Biratnagar, or Butwal. Delivery to 7 offices.

Digital Tracking

Track your bilty online anytime — without calling our offices.

24 Years Experience

Established 2002. Hundreds of businesses trust us monthly.

Our Services

Freight Solutions for Every Need

Two core services built around how cargo actually moves in Nepal.

Full Truck Load (FTL) · Full Trip

Dedicated truck, direct route — ideal for bulk shipments across any part of Nepal.

Home / About Us

About Gaurav Transport

Nearly three decades of moving Nepal's cargo — reliably and with pride.

Our Story

Moving Nepal Forward Since 2002

Gaurav Transport Pvt. Ltd. was established in 2002 with a clear purpose—to provide dependable, efficient, and transparent road freight services for businesses across Nepal.

What began as a single operation has steadily grown into one of Nepal's trusted transport companies, serving manufacturers, wholesalers, distributors, retailers, and businesses of every size.

Today, our fleet of more than 50 trucks, combined with 3 booking offices and 9 delivery offices, enables us to transport goods across the country every day. From major cities to remote districts, we remain committed to delivering cargo safely, on time, and with the professionalism our customers have come to expect.

For more than two decades, our success has been built on long-term relationships, operational excellence, and a deep understanding of Nepal's unique logistics landscape. As Nepal continues to grow, we remain dedicated to helping businesses move with confidence.

Dilip Kumar Dharewal

Managing Director

Dilip Kumar Dharewal leads Gaurav Transport Pvt Ltd Nepal, bringing decades of hands-on experience in freight and logistics to every part of the business — from fleet operations to client relationships across the country.

2002
Year Established
50+
Trucks in Operation
10+
Offices Nationwide
24+
Years of Service
Our Values

What We Stand For

Reliability

We commit to timelines and honour them. Your cargo moves when we say it will.

Transparency

Clear pricing, no hidden charges. You know what you're paying before goods leave.

Safety

Every shipment is handled with care. Cargo safety is never compromised.

Coverage

Mechi to Mahakali. We invest in reach so you never look elsewhere for a route.

Nepali Pride

A homegrown company that understands Nepal's terrain and business culture deeply.

Growth

We grow alongside our clients — expanding fleet, offices, and capabilities constantly.

Our Journey

Milestones Over the Years

2002
Company Founded
Commenced operations in Biratnagar with a small fleet and a vision to serve Nepal's freight needs.
2007
Kathmandu Branch Opened
Expanded westward with a dedicated booking office in Kathmandu, connecting the capital to our eastern network.
2012
Fleet Growth
Steady growth enabled us to take on larger volumes and serve more routes simultaneously.
2015
Butwal Branch & Western Expansion
Opened Butwal office and extended delivery to Nepalgunj and Dhangadi — completing our east-to-west corridor.
2025
Digital Tracking Launched
Online shipment tracking for clients — real-time bilty status available 24/7.
Today
50+ Trucks, 10+ Offices
One of Nepal's largest transport companies — still growing, still committed to every client we serve.

Home / Services

Our Services

Full truck load and LTL freight solutions across Nepal.

Freight Solutions

Two Services, All of Nepal

Whether you need a full truck or just a few boxes — we have the right solution from our 3 booking offices.

Full Truck Load (FTL) · Full Trip

Dedicated truck exclusively for your cargo — maximum speed, security, and flexibility.

We service all over Nepal — any location, any route. From the eastern border at Mechi to the far-western frontier at Mahakali.
Mechi to MahakaliAny DistrictHill RoutesTerai Routes10T – 38T TrucksDoor to Door
  • Entire truck reserved exclusively for your consignment
  • Ideal for manufacturers, importers, bulk traders
  • Fastest delivery — no consolidation delays
  • Available in 10-tonne, 18-tonne, 25-tonne and 38-tonne categories
  • Custom route planning for difficult or off-route locations

Less Than Truck Load (LTL) · Khudra Maal

Share truck space with other consignments — pay only for what you send.

We have 3 booking branches each serving specific destinations. Drop off at the nearest office.
Kathmandu (KTM) → East Nepal
BiratnagarItahariDamakBirtamodeDharan (Bulk Goods)Narayanghat (Coming Soon)
Also serving locations along the Itahari–Birtamode route.
Biratnagar (BRT) → Central & West Nepal
NarayanghatKathmanduButwalBhairahawaNepalgunjDhangadi
Butwal (BTL) → Far-West Nepal
NepalgunjDhangadiMahendranagar
Also serving locations along the route to Dhangadi.

FTL Coverage — All of Nepal

No route is too far, no district out of reach for our full truck load service.

KathmanduBiratnagarButwalBhairahawaItahariDamakBirtamodeNarayanghatNepalgunjDhangadiBirgunjHetaudaDharanJanakpurPokhara+ Any Location

Not Sure Which Service You Need?

Contact us and we'll help you pick the right option for your cargo size and route.

Home / Career

Join Our Team

Be part of one of Nepal's largest transport companies.

Career

Grow With Gaurav Transport

We're always looking for reliable, hardworking people to join our growing team across Nepal.

With 50+ trucks and a network spanning the entire country, Gaurav Transport offers stable, meaningful opportunities in Nepal's logistics industry.

We value reliability, integrity, and teamwork. Whether you're an experienced driver or a fresh graduate in logistics — there's a place for you here.

Truck Driver

Pan-Nepal routes · Experience preferred

Apply Now →

Branch Coordinator

Booking & operations · Any branch

Apply Now →

Accounts & Billing

Head Office — Biratnagar

Apply Now →

Delivery Staff

Various delivery offices

Apply Now →

Office Assistant

Kathmandu / Butwal branch

Apply Now →

Why Work With Us?

  • Stable employment with one of Nepal's largest private fleets
  • Pan-Nepal operations — opportunities across all regions
  • 24+ years of trust and financial stability
  • Growth opportunities as the company expands
  • Supportive, family-run team culture
  • Competitive compensation and on-time salary
